title: Bee Removal in Hicksville, Long Island | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Hicksville, Long Island. Safe, humane extraction by licensed experts. Same-day service available. Call now for $350-$550 bee removal.
intro: Dealing with a bee infestation in Hicksville? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout this vibrant Long Island community. Our licensed technicians safely remove bee colonies from residential and commercial properties, protecting your family and property while preserving these essential pollinators whenever possible.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Hicksville homeowners and businesses for years with fast, reliable bee removal services. Our experienced team uses humane removal methods and offers competitive pricing from $350-$550, with same-day emergency service available throughout Nassau County.
localContext: Hicksville's mix of suburban homes, the bustling Broadway Mall area, and tree-lined neighborhoods near Cantiague Park creates ideal nesting conditions for bees in attics, wall voids, and eaves. Our technicians are familiar with the unique construction styles of Hicksville properties, from post-war Cape Cods to newer developments, ensuring thorough and effective bee colony removal.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Hicksville typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the colony size, location, and accessibility. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Hicksville property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Hicksville and surrounding Long Island areas. Most bee removal jobs are completed within 2-4 hours, though larger colonies or difficult-to-access locations may require additional time.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation, working with local beekeepers to safely transfer honey bee colonies. However, in cases where relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns or aggressive Africanized bees, we may recommend extermination followed by complete hive removal.

faqs.question: Will bees return after removal in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes complete hive and honeycomb removal, along with thorough cleaning to eliminate pheromone traces that attract new swarms. We also seal entry points and provide recommendations to prevent future infestations, giving you long-term protection.
